// src/App.js - Complete working version import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import './App.css'; function App() { const [isScrolled, setIsScrolled] = useState(false); const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: '', email: '', message: '' }); const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { const handleScroll = () => setIsScrolled(window.scrollY > 50); window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); }, []); const brands = ['Proton', 'Perodua', 'Toyota', 'Honda', 'Nissan', 'BMW', 'Mercedes', 'Mazda', 'Mitsubishi']; const services = [ { icon: '🔧', title: 'Engine Repair', desc: 'Complete diagnostics and repair' }, { icon: '🛢️', title: 'Oil Change', desc: 'Premium oil change services' }, { icon: '🛑', title: 'Brake Service', desc: 'Full brake inspection' }, { icon: '❄️', title: 'Air Conditioning', desc: 'AC system maintenance' }, { icon: '🔋', title: 'Battery Replacement', desc: 'Quality battery brands' }, { icon: '💻', title: 'Diagnostics', desc: 'Computerized diagnostics' }, ]; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setSubmitted(true); setTimeout(() => setSubmitted(false), 4000); }; return (
